Subject: Re: [SkogAI/supabase] [WIP] Enable auth service and implement SAML SSO (PR #197)

Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="--==_mimepart_6901e0461fc38_21dfe1100100596"; charset="UTF-8"

@Copilot commented on this pull request.

## Pull Request Overview

This PR adds SAML SSO configuration to the Supabase Docker deployment by introducing environment variables for GoTrue authentication service. The changes enable enterprise single sign-on authentication via SAML.

- Added SAML environment variables to docker-compose.yml for the auth service
- Configured SAML settings in .env file with enabled flag and private key
- Created comprehensive documentation file detailing the SAML setup process

### Reviewed Changes

Copilot reviewed 5 out of 5 changed files in this pull request and generated 3 comments.

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| supabase/docker/docker-compose.yml | Adds GOTRUE_SAML_ENABLED and GOTRUE_SAML_PRIVATE_KEY environment variables to auth service |
| .env | Configures SAML SSO with enabled flag set to true and base64-encoded private key |
| SAML_SETUP_COMPLETE.md | Comprehensive documentation covering setup, configuration, testing, and troubleshooting |





---

💡 <a href="/SkogAI/supabase/new/master/.github?filename=*.instructions.md" class="Link--inTextBlock" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Add Copilot custom instructions</a> for smarter, more guided reviews. <a href="https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/customizing-copilot/adding-repository-custom-instructions-for-github-copilot" class="Link--inTextBlock" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Learn how to get started</a>.

> @@ -268,3 +268,12 @@
 # # Production Database URL with SSL (example)
 # # Replace [YOUR-PASSWORD] and [PROJECT-REF] with actual values
 # # DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:[YOUR-PASSWORD]@db.[PROJECT-REF].supabase.co:5432/postgres?sslmode=verify-full&sslrootcert=${SSL_CERT_PATH}
+
+# ============================================================================
+# SAML SSO Configuration (Active)
+# ============================================================================
+# Enable SAML SSO authentication for enterprise single sign-on
+# Generated by scripts/generate-saml-key.sh
+
+GOTRUE_SAML_ENABLED=true
+GOTRUE_SAML_PRIVATE_

A real private key is being committed to version control. Even though .env is in .gitignore, the diff shows the actual base64-encoded private key being added. If this is a production or real key, it should be replaced with a placeholder value (e.g., '<your-base64-encoded-key-here>') in the committed .env file. Real keys should only exist in local or deployed environments, never in version control history.
```suggestion
GOTRUE_SAML_PRIVATE_KEY=<your-base64-encoded-key-here>
```

> @@ -144,6 +144,11 @@ services:
 
       GOTRUE_EXTERNAL_PHONE_ENABLED: ${ENABLE_PHONE_SIGNUP}
       GOTRUE_SMS_AUTOCONFIRM: ${ENABLE_PHONE_AUTOCONFIRM}
+      

Trailing whitespace on line 147. This should be removed to maintain consistent formatting.
```suggestion

```

> @@ -144,6 +144,11 @@ services:
 
       GOTRUE_EXTERNAL_PHONE_ENABLED: ${ENABLE_PHONE_SIGNUP}
       GOTRUE_SMS_AUTOCONFIRM: ${ENABLE_PHONE_AUTOCONFIRM}
+      
+      # SAML SSO Configuration
+      GOTRUE_SAML_ENABLED: ${GOTRUE_SAML_ENABLED:-false}
+      GOTRUE_SAML_PRIVATE_KEY: ${GOTRUE_SAML_PRIVATE_KEY:-}
+      

Trailing whitespace on line 151. This should be removed to maintain consistent formatting.
```suggestion

```
